canSetAssigneeOnTaskCreation.description: Whether or not tasks of this schema can be created with a non-null assignee.

defaultCreationFolderId.description: ID of the default folder for creating workflow task groups

defaultEntryExecutionFolderId.description: ID of the default folder for workflow task execution entries

entryTemplateId.description: The ID of the template of the entries tasks of this schema will be executed into.

isPropagateWatchersEnabled.description: Whether propagation of watchers has been enabled for this task schema.

prefix.description: The prefix for the displayId of tasks of this schema.

taskGroupPrefix.description: The prefix for the displayId of task groups containing tasks of this schema
